featureName: BUG-026-006 malformed / empty LLM JSON hard-drops the capture
title: Malformed/truncated/empty LLM JSON hard-drops the capture (no salvage, no SST-gated degraded fallback; None content bypasses the branch via TypeError)

parentContext.mechanism: tolerant _parse_llm_json (salvage + None/empty guard) + SST-gated degraded fallback on the except json.JSONDecodeError branch (ML_PROCESSING_DEGRADED_FALLBACK_ENABLED, fail-loud) + SST-owned max_tokens (ML_DOMAIN_OUTPUT_TOKEN_BUDGET)

scopeSummary.title: Preserve the capture for any unparseable / empty LLM payload (SST-gated)
scopeSummary.notes: Completed + certified 2026-07-19. The capture-preservation contract is complete: tolerant salvage + SST-gated degraded fallback on the malformed-JSON branch (landed 2026-07-08), SST-owned max_tokens (landed 2026-07-09, spec 102), and the None/empty-content guard closed THIS session (a None content raised a TypeError that bypassed the degraded-fallback branch and hard-dropped the capture; now it raises json.JSONDecodeError and routes through the same capture-preserving branch). All 14 DoD items marked [x] with fresh current-session evidence: Python unit lane 624 passed/2 skipped (PY_UNIT_RC=0) — a scenario-first RED (2 failed, 622 passed with the TypeError hard-drop) then GREEN (624 passed) for the None/empty completion; regression-quality-guard --bugfix adversarial signal 0 violations (REGRESSION_GUARD_RC=0); check clean (CHECK_RC=0); lint clean (LINT_RC=0, ruff All checks passed); format --check names only the pre-existing unrelated internal/config/release_trains_contract_test.go (outside the ml/ boundary, untouched). The live 'malformed responses preserve the capture on the redeployed image' outcome + the model-quality/latency root cause (R-102-D) are routed to bubbles.devops as non-gating. Full 8-phase bugfix-fastlane pipeline parent-expanded this session. Scope-Kind: contract-only.

executionHistory.note: Created the bug packet from the redteam adversarial interrogation of the live smackerel prod deployment (Invalid JSON from LLM: Unterminated string under light host load). Implemented the tolerant _parse_llm_json salvage + the SST-gated degraded fallback on the except json.JSONDecodeError branch so a malformed/truncated/prose-wrapped payload preserves the capture; added the three adversarial tests.

spec 102 SCOPE-102-03 addressed the output-token-budget half in-repo: max_tokens now reads resolve_domain_output_token_budget() (SST-owned ML_DOMAIN_OUTPUT_TOKEN_BUDGET, default raised 2000 -> 4096), replacing the hardcoded 2000 that could truncate the schema. Adversarial test test_output_budget_read_from_sst_not_hardcoded_spec102 added.

executionHistory.note: COMPLETED the residual None/empty-content hole this session. A None content reached json.loads(None) -> TypeError, bypassing the except json.JSONDecodeError degraded-fallback branch and hard-dropping the capture via the generic handler. Added a two-line guard to _parse_llm_json (raise json.JSONDecodeError for None/whitespace) so empty/None responses route through the same capture-preserving branch, plus two adversarial regression tests. git status names only ml/app/processor.py + ml/tests/test_processor.py. Fresh ./smackerel.sh check clean (CHECK_RC=0). See report.md Code Diff Evidence.

advancedBy.what: The ops-routed output-token-budget half was ADDRESSED IN-REPO. The hardcoded max_tokens=2000 in ml/app/processor.py + the token_budget=2000 fallback in ml/app/synthesis.py were REPLACED with an SST-owned budget: services.ml.domain_output_token_budget -> ML_DOMAIN_OUTPUT_TOKEN_BUDGET (fail-loud, no default; boot-checked by ml/app/main.py::_check_required_config; read by ml/app/ollama_keepalive.py::resolve_domain_output_token_budget). Default raised 2000 -> 4096 so a domain/synthesis JSON object is not truncated mid-object. Adversarial test ml/tests/test_processor.py::test_output_budget_read_from_sst_not_hardcoded_spec102 sets ML_DOMAIN_OUTPUT_TOKEN_BUDGET=1234 and asserts max_tokens==1234 AND !=2000. STILL OPS-GATED (R-102-D): the live model-quality / 71-95s latency verification on <deploy-host> under ROCm remains an operator-host step.

routing.reason: The full bugfix-fastlane specialist pipeline (implement, test, regression, simplify, stabilize, security, validate, audit) executed this session with fresh evidence in report.md, and state-transition-guard.sh passes at done. The capture-preservation contract is complete: the None/empty-content guard (this session), on top of the landed tolerant salvage + SST-gated degraded fallback + SST-owned output budget, is git-present at HEAD (git status names only ml/app/processor.py + ml/tests/test_processor.py). The live 'malformed responses preserve the capture on the redeployed smackerel-ml image' outcome + the model-quality/latency root cause (R-102-D: gemma4:26b truncated JSON + 71-95s latency under light load) are NON-GATING operational steps: NEXT REQUIRED OWNER bubbles.devops/operator runs the smackerel-ml rebuild + signed redeploy + live re-run and makes the model-selection call.

routed.what: gemma4:26b emits truncated JSON ('Unterminated string') and 71-95s synthesis / >30s domain-extraction latency under LIGHT host load. The remaining model-quality/latency root cause + the live post-redeploy verification are the model-selection call (R-102-D), non-gating: rebuild+sign+redeploy smackerel-ml and confirm malformed responses preserve the capture on the running image and domain extraction fits the 30s budget.

notes: In-repo capture-preservation resilience COMPLETE (2026-07-19): tolerant _parse_llm_json salvage + SST-gated graceful degradation (landed 2026-07-08) so a malformed/truncated/prose-wrapped response preserves the capture; SST-owned output-token budget (landed 2026-07-09, spec 102) replacing the hardcoded 2000; and the None/empty-content edge closed THIS session (a None content raised a TypeError that bypassed the degraded-fallback branch and hard-dropped the capture; now raises json.JSONDecodeError and routes through the same branch).
